name: ndlaw
description: Search North Dakota primary law — Supreme Court & Court of Appeals opinions (1889–present), the Constitution, N.D.C.C. statutes, court rules, and the Administrative Code — via a remote MCP server.
long_description:
Connects Claude Desktop to a self-hosted ndlaw endpoint over Streamable HTTP. The bundle ships `mcp-remote` inside the extension and invokes it with an absolute path, so it works regardless of whether `npx` is on the spawned Node process's PATH. Prompts for the server URL at install time — the URL itself (a capability URL containing an unguessable path segment) is the access credential; there is no separate username or password.

Provides 26 tools across ND opinions and primary law (Constitution, N.D.C.C. statutes, court rules, Administrative Code): citation/authority lookup, point-in-time provision text, full-text search, citation tracing, citing-opinion lists, and more.

url.title: Server URL
url.description: The full URL the admin sent you, ending in /mcp. Treat it like a password — the unguessable path segment is what grants access.
